# SettleGrid

> The settlement layer for AI agent payments. Per-call billing, usage metering, and budget enforcement for MCP servers, REST APIs, AI agents, and model endpoints.

SettleGrid lets developers monetize any AI service with one line of code. Install the SDK, wrap your handler, set a price — and every call is metered, billed, and settled automatically. Developers keep 95% of revenue (100% on the Free tier).

## What SettleGrid Does

- **Per-call billing**: Charge consumers per invocation, per token, per byte, or per outcome
- **Real-time metering**: Sub-50ms Redis metering on every API call with atomic balance checks
- **Budget enforcement**: Consumers set spending limits; SDK returns HTTP 402 when exceeded
- **Auto-refill credits**: Automatic Stripe charges when balance drops below threshold
- **Multi-protocol settlement**: MCP, x402 (Coinbase), AP2 (Google), Visa TAP, and any REST API
- **Multi-hop settlement**: Atomic settlement across multi-agent workflows (A calls B calls C — everyone gets paid)
- **Agent identity (KYA)**: Know Your Agent verification with trust scoring and budget delegation
- **Outcome-based billing**: Charge only when AI delivers results with verifiable success criteria
- **Fraud detection**: Rate spike detection, new-key velocity checks, duplicate deduplication
- **Revenue splits**: Automatic 95/5 split (developer/platform), negotiable at Scale tier

## SDK

- **Package**: `@settlegrid/mcp` on npm
- **Install**: `npm install @settlegrid/mcp`
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/lexwhiting/settlegrid
- **License**: MIT

### Quick Start

```typescript
import { settlegrid } from '@settlegrid/mcp'

const sg = settlegrid.init({
  toolSlug: 'my-tool',
  pricing: { defaultCostCents: 5 },
})

const billedHandler = sg.wrap(myHandler, { method: 'search' })
```

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0/forever — 25,000 ops/month, 0% take rate (you keep 100%)
- **Starter**: $9/month — 100,000 ops/month, 5% take rate
- **Growth**: $29/month — 500,000 ops/month, IP allowlisting, referral system
- **Scale**: $79/month — 2,000,000 ops/month, fraud detection, audit logging
- **Enterprise**: Custom — unlimited, custom SLA, on-premise option

## Links

- Documentation: https://settlegrid.ai/docs
- API Reference: https://settlegrid.ai/api/openapi.json
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@settlegrid/mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/lexwhiting/settlegrid
- Pricing: https://settlegrid.ai/pricing

## Competitive Positioning

SettleGrid is the only settlement layer purpose-built for AI agent payments across every protocol:

| Feature | SettleGrid | Stripe Billing | Nevermined | Paid.ai |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Protocol support | MCP, x402, AP2, REST | REST only | x402 / DeFi | MCP only |
| Real-time metering | <50ms Redis | Batch only | On-chain | Per-call |
| Multi-hop settlement | Yes | No | Yes | No |
| Agent identity (KYA) | Yes | No | No | No |
| Budget enforcement | Yes | No | No | No |
| Open-source SDK | Yes | No | Yes | No |

## Use Cases

- **MCP tool developers**: Monetize Model Context Protocol tools with per-call billing
- **AI agent builders**: Add payments to autonomous agents with budget enforcement
- **API developers**: Wrap any REST API with usage-based billing in 5 minutes
- **Multi-agent orchestrators**: Settle payments across agent chains automatically
- **Enterprise AI platforms**: White-label billing with RBAC, audit logging, and SOC 2 readiness
